CL-09.title: Page Loading Speed
CL-09.description: The website has slow loading speed, leading to high bounce rates and poor user experience.
CL-09.remediation: Optimize images, minify CSS and JavaScript files, and leverage browser caching to enhance page loading speed.

CL-14.title: SEO-Friendly URLs
CL-14.description: The website uses non-descriptive URLs that are not optimized for search engine visibility.
CL-14.remediation: Implement SEO-friendly URLs with relevant keywords to improve search engine rankings and user experience.
